profile.name: Sakae Shunsuke
profile.title: AI Governance Architect / Head of Systems
profile.description: Works across Ruby on Rails, Python, React/Next.js, and AWS, owning the full development process from requirements to operations. Focused on generative-AI-powered system development and efficient engineering workflows built around Claude Code.

bio: An AI governance architect who designs and drives company-wide generative-AI adoption — controls included — under financial-grade governance (FISC security guidelines, J-SOX IT general controls, and Japan's APPI). As Head of Systems at a fintech company, I lead a team of four and own technology selection, hiring and mentoring, and internal-audit response. The foundation is end-to-end engineering, from requirements through operations, in Ruby on Rails, Python, React/Next.js, and AWS. I also write actively about technology: 1.43M+ cumulative views across 270+ articles on Qiita (as of 2026).

values.title: End-to-End Development
values.description: Leading the full system lifecycle — requirements, design, implementation, and operations

values.description: 1.43M+ cumulative views and 270+ articles on Qiita. Committed to sharing what I learn

values.description: Focused on generative-AI-powered system development and efficient engineering workflows

values.title: Control × Adoption
values.description: Turning generative AI into business leverage, safely, under financial-grade governance (J-SOX, FISC, APPI)

expertise.description: Lead a four-person systems department: delegation design for technical decisions, hiring, mentoring and evaluation, roadmap planning, and alignment with executives
API design and implementation in Ruby on Rails (5+ years) and Python. Systems built to comply with financial regulation
UI implementation with React/Next.js and JavaScript. Responsive and accessibility-minded
AWS (5+ years). Robust infrastructure built on EC2, RDS, Lambda, IoT Core, and many other services
AI system development with the OpenAI API, Claude, and Amazon Bedrock/SageMaker. Led company-wide generative-AI adoption, automating and streamlining operations

J-SOX IT general controls (ITGC), FISC security-guideline assessments, internal-audit response and remediation, alignment with Japan's APPI and internal policy, and confidential-data handling design. Generative-AI adoption with controls in place

timeline.title: HiJoJo Partners, Inc. — Head of Systems
timeline.description: Lead a four-person systems department, owning hiring, mentoring, technology selection, and the roadmap. Drive company-wide generative-AI adoption and governance: FISC security guidelines, J-SOX IT general controls, and internal-audit response

timeline.title: HiJoJo Partners, Inc. — Solutions Architect
timeline.description: Led development, maintenance, and operations of HiJoJo.com, the online fund-distribution system that serves as the company's revenue channel. Contributed channel-expanding features such as a partner site for distribution partners

timeline.title: PDC Inc. — Full-Stack Engineer
timeline.description: Led the technical launch of an IoT×AI audience-measurement business from zero in-house ML knowledge (self-taught model development; led validation for a seven-person team). Also built content-delivery and maintenance-management systems

timeline.title: Isuzu Motors Ltd. — Production Division
timeline.description: Production planning for new-vehicle programs. Automated 37% of data-entry work with RPA, saving 775 hours per year, and shortened document circulation from 17.5 days to 7.5 business days

timeline.title: Okayama University — Graduate School of Natural Science and Technology
timeline.description: Presented at an IEEE international conference. Researched energy-management systems for residential solar generation and fuel-cell vehicles

certifications.name: Ruby Association Certified Ruby Programmer Gold
